Package io.github.bbobbogi.stream4j.soop.chat

Class SOOPDonationMessage

java.lang.Object
io.github.bbobbogi.stream4j.soop.chat.SOOPDonationMessage
public class SOOPDonationMessage extends Object
Donation event payload received from SOOP chat.
Since:
1.0.0

  • Constructor Details

    • SOOPDonationMessage

      public SOOPDonationMessage(SOOPDonationMessage.Type type, String to, String from, String fromUsername, int amount, int fanClubOrdinal)
      Creates a donation message model.
      Parameters:
      type - donation type
      to - target broadcaster or channel identifier
      from - donor user ID
      fromUsername - donor display name
      amount - donated star-balloon amount
      fanClubOrdinal - fan-club order index from SOOP payload

  • Method Details

    • getType

      public SOOPDonationMessage.Type getType()
      Returns donation type.
      Returns:
      donation type

    • getTo

      public String getTo()
      Returns target broadcaster or channel identifier.
      Returns:
      donation target value from payload

    • getFrom

      public String getFrom()
      Returns donor user ID.
      Returns:
      donor user ID

    • getFromUsername

      public String getFromUsername()
      Returns donor display name.
      Returns:
      donor nickname

    • getAmount

      public int getAmount()
      Returns donated star-balloon amount.
      Returns:
      donation amount

    • getFanClubOrdinal

      public int getFanClubOrdinal()
      Returns fan-club sequence value from SOOP payload.
      Returns:
      fan-club ordinal, or 0 when absent

    • isNewFanClub

      public boolean isNewFanClub()
      Returns whether this donation indicates a new fan-club milestone.
      Returns:
      true if fan-club ordinal is greater than zero

      public String toString()
